# AFO Mobile Visual Runtime

Version: 0.0.2

AFO Mobile Visual Runtime is a mobile-first visual runtime for agent-built apps. It compiles JSON scene specs into touch-first Three.js web apps designed for Cloudflare Workers.

Live runtime:
https://afo-mobile-visual-runtime.jaredtechfit.workers.dev

Primary routes:
- /health
- /mcp/tools
- /mcp/schema
- /mcp/call
- /api/sample-scene
- /api/scene/validate
- /api/scene/optimize
- /api/compile
- /api/receipt
- /openapi.json
- /agent-actions

Use /api/sample-scene to get an example. Use /api/scene/validate before compile. Use /api/compile to generate HTML. Use /mcp/call for tool-style calls.
